---
title: 'Wine Answers Admin Dashboard'
---

# Context

The tasting creation as a host must be fluid, easy and rapid process.
Right now there are too many manual edits for every wine.
Plus, a host with a low level of knwoledge about wine will have difficulties to "imagine" fun and good distractors.
Let's ease the tasting creation process and make it more fun and realistic.

# Description

Any Host when creating a tasting and when add wines can add custom answers if not present from the list (/Users/mac-FDUCAT18/Workspace/FDUCAT/SommelierArena/.github/issues/feat/dynamic-wine-answers.md) and its newly typed/entered answer gets a added to the list.

This issue is about implementing an admin dashboard page to enable answers management (CRUD) by an admin.
